texto: Acting can work a peculiar magic on the actor ... it can cure you (at least for the length of a performance) of a whole variety of ailments. Migraine headaches miserable colds or toothaches will suddenly disappear as you're up there going through your paces.
explicacao: Citação de Barbara Harris sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “Acting can work a peculiar magic on the actor ... it can cure you (at least for the length of a p…” articula trabalho, getting, going em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e trabalho.
